For custom CodeSets the estimated ship date is four to five weeks from the receipt of a Purchase Order and signed CodeSet Design Report.
For inventoried panels the estimated ship date is the next available shipping day.
For specific ship dates please send an email referencing the Sales Order number to soa@nanostring.com
All sales of the items quoted herein are subject to the applicable terms and conditions available at https://www.nanostring.com/legal/terms-sale.
We impose a 2% surcharge on all credit card transactions, which is not greater than our cost of 
acceptance. Debit cards are not surcharged.
